sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n5887" key="a)mfi/koitos" type="gloss" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀμφίκοιτος·</orth> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ὁ τάπης,</foreign> <sense id="n5887.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">coverlet,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Suid.</author> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
